_comment: Species: Soul Beast (魂兽) from Pursuit of the Truth. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Soul Beast

canonical.appearance: Ghostly beast 3 m, body semi-translucent, eyes cold green fire
canonical.behavior: Hunts soul fragments; cultivates by consuming souls
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: soul_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon
